checklist.claim: startsWith(needs.gate.outputs.command, '/devflow:review ') includes /devflow:review N and excludes /devflow:review-and-fix N
checklist.evidence: resolve-command-trigger.sh:76 emits '$cmd $number'; trailing space excludes review-and-fix (pos-15 '-')

checklist.claim: github_token ternary resolves reviewer token for review, primary for else; GITHUB_TOKEN always present so no falsy fall-through
needs.gate.outputs.command is an exposed gate-job output the command job reads
checklist.evidence: devflow.yml:300 outputs command; command job needs: [config, review_dedupe, gate]

checklist.claim: devflow-runner.yml carries zero primary-app references (DEVFLOW_APP_ID / DEVFLOW_APP_PRIVATE_KEY / steps.app-token)
checklist.evidence: grep -c = 0 for all three; run.sh pins it

checklist.claim: devflow-review.yml passes DEVFLOW_REVIEWER_PRIVATE_KEY to the runner via secrets: inherit
checklist.evidence: devflow-review.yml:498 secrets: inherit; runner declares DEVFLOW_REVIEWER_PRIVATE_KEY

checklist.claim: reviewer mint downscoped perm set (contents/issues:read, pull-requests:write, actions:read) matches the pre-change review mint
checklist.evidence: 4 permission-* inputs identical to old app-token review mint

phase3_findings.description: docs/cloud-setup.md:180 'Every mint step is gated on vars.DEVFLOW_APP_ID' now globally imprecise (reviewer mints gate on DEVFLOW_REVIEWER_APP_ID)
devflow.yml reviewer mint's && startsWith(...) command-gate conjunct not positively pinned; dropping it would mint reviewer token on pr-description (harmless, unused, but lost intent pin)
